name: Hololive ENigmatic Recollection (ENreco) Chapter 2: Chains of Fate Ending
description:
(From the Hololive English Official YouTube Channel)

<I saw the ending and the trailer for ENigmatic Recollection Chapter 3: Broken Bonds, and I think, what if I make it here? And so I did. You'll decide if the story will continue by joining the HoloAdvent or stay with the rest of HoloEN>
